title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions in Vadodara is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions:
Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
